message:
Add errdefer cleanup to expression parsers

- parsePostfix: Track ownership, clean up node on error
- parseAttribute: Take ownership of value, clean up on error
- parseSubscript: Track val_copied flag, clean up appropriately
- parseAddSub/parseMulDiv/parsePower: errdefer for left/right nodes
- parseExprOrAssign: errdefer for initial expression

Results:
- Simple files: 0 leaks
- blinker import: 0 leaks
- Flask import: 6 leaks (one per failed module file)

The remaining 6 leaks are from Flask submodules that fail parsing
due to unsupported Python syntax. Each failed module leaks ~1 node.
